series_metadata.series_title: State Wide Cost Allocation Plan (SWCAP) Report and Support Documents
series_metadata.series_description: SWCAP (State Wide Cost Allocation Plan) worksheets and analysis of rate schedules, including: final cost plan, OAKS division data, reports, schedules, division communication, Federal audit review, and communication letters & email in both print and electronic form. These are necessary so that compliance with SWCAP obligations can be achieved.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 years after Federal audit review and approval, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
